//: Post-conditions the cross-app-e2e run.sh harness asserts after the four-app
composition story (alice issues credential -> bob registers attested name +
mounts namespace route -> carol posts bounty + subscription -> dan claims +
Each entry is the name of a boolean result emitted by verify.py. The
verifier MUST report `true` for every must_pass entry and `true` for every
must_not_pass entry (the latter use names of the form `rejects_*` so a
true value means the tamper attempt was correctly rejected).
scenario: four-app cross-composition: identity → nameservice → governed-namespace → subscription
kernel_primitives_exercised: Monotonic (revocation root, message root, publishers/consumers root)
canonical Action shape (method symbol, effects, witness_blobs)
composition_story_steps: step1: alice creates identity-issuer cell + issues verified-developer-v1 credential to bob
step2: bob registers bob.dev in nameservice attested tier (witness predicate = credential set commitment)
step3: bob mounts pyana://bob.dev under governed-namespace (resolve target = nameservice hash)
step4: carol posts bounty + creates subscription cell + grants bob consumer + grants own bounty cell publisher
step5: dan claims bounty (Posted -> Claimed publish)
step6: dan fulfills bounty (Claimed -> Fulfilled publish)
step8: carol settles bounty (Fulfilled -> Settled publish)
